summary: South Bay startups are on a funding tear: Nexthop AI, MatX, and Ayar Labs each landed half-billion-dollar rounds in early March, while hardware plays like Frore Systems (San Jose, $143M Series D) and RoboForce (Milpitas, $52M Series A) signal investor appetite beyond pure software. Most local tech companies are hiring, though a few are tightening belts—a sign the region's growth remains selective but robust.
